author: Jacob Mei
description: Hybrid semantic search for your vault notes. BM25 + WebGPU embedding + fuzzy retrieval, Multilingual, with particularly strong Chinese/CJK support, with optional LLM - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jacob Mei

manifest.name: Vault Curate

name: Vault Curate

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
Audit compliance patch — resolves the type-safety warnings from the Obsidian Developer Dashboard's 1.1.0 audit (unsafe `any` assignment, unnecessary type assertions, one floating promise). Type-level changes only; no behaviour changes.

See [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/notoriouslab/vault-curate/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for details.

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
## Relation graph (Canvas)

Generate an editable **Obsidian Canvas** around any note — the note in the center, its top-K semantic neighbors laid out radially, every edge labeled with its similarity score.

- **Purple edges** = semantically close but **not yet linked** — connections the native graph view can't surface
- **Gray edges** (with direction arrows) = notes you've already wikilinked
- **Cyan nodes** = Cold notes (untouched beyond the Hot window)

**Three entry points**: command palette (`Generate relation graph (Canvas)`), right-click a note (`VC: Generate relation graph`), or the **Graph** button on the Discover sidebar (targets the pinned note when pinned). Right-click any node *inside* the generated canvas to expand one hop further.

Every run writes a fresh timestamped `.canvas` file under **Settings → Advanced → Relation graph folder** (default `Vault Curate Canvases`) — your edited graphs are never overwritten.

Zero new dependencies; the graph is assembled from the existing embedding index, so generation is instant.

Requested in the community forum (forum-zh #61655) — thanks for the feedback! 🙏

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
UX patch from forum-zh thread #61655 community feedback.

### Fixed
- **Duplicate-looking titles in result lists**. Template-generated notes that share the same `# H1` heading (common for clinical / journaling / log templates) previously all rendered with the same title in Search / Discover lists, making them indistinguishable. The H1 fallback now performs a collision check across the vault — H1s that appear in 2+ files automatically fall back to `file.basename` so each note remains visually unique. Frontmatter `title:` (when present) still wins unconditionally.

### Notes
- Existing indexes auto-migrate on the next **Update** — files whose stored title differs under the new rule are re-indexed transparently. No manual Rebuild required.

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
## Audit compliance patch

Addresses three findings raised by the Obsidian Developer Dashboard auto-audit on v1.0.2.

### Changed
- **Build**: esbuild now strips `require("node:fs")` and `require("node:crypto")` from the bundled `sql.js` Emscripten output. Those branches are dead code in Obsidian's renderer process (gated by `process.type !== "renderer"`); removing the syntactic references resolves the Dashboard's "Direct Filesystem Access" warning without changing runtime behaviour.

### Docs
- README + README.zh-TW: added an **Audit disclosures** section explaining the remaining audit recommendations — vault enumeration (necessary for indexing; user-scopable via `excludePatterns`), and `new Function` inside bundled `@huggingface/transformers` (library internals only; Vault Curate's own source contains zero `eval` / `new Function`).

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
## UX patch — community feedback driven

### Fixed
- LLM model dropdown stuck on "Loading..." when using built-in WebGPU embedding + AI curation. Now correctly fetches Ollama models regardless of embedding provider. (#7)

### Added
- **Hover preview**: Cmd/Ctrl + hover Search/Discover results now shows Obsidian native Page Preview popup, same behavior as `[[wikilinks]]`. (#6)
- **Pin Discover**: 📌 button in the Discover toolbar to lock the sidebar to the current note. Click through to peek at results without losing your discovery context. Auto-unpins on delete or when switching to Global mode. (#6)

### i18n
- 5 new strings for pin feature (English + Traditional Chinese)

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
## Fixes

- **Onboarding**: selecting **built-in (WebGPU) embedding + AI curation** is now allowed when Ollama is reachable on `localhost:11434`. Previously this valid combination was hard-rejected, forcing users to switch embedding providers unnecessarily.
- **Settings → AI curation**: new **LLM endpoint status** block surfaces the actual URL the LLM will hit, a live reachability probe, and a one-click **Recheck** button — answers "I flipped the toggle but description generation does nothing" in-place.
- **Wording**: AI curation / LLM model descriptions clarified to reflect both Ollama and OpenAI-compatible support.

No data migration required.

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
vault-curate (formerly `vault-search`) — Chinese-first semantic search for Obsidian with optional AI curation.

## Highlights

- **Built-in Chinese embedding** — `bge-small-zh-v1.5` runs on device via WebGPU/WASM (~110 MB one-time download). No daemon, no API key needed.
- **Hybrid Fusion search** — BM25 + semantic + fuzzy combined via Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Exact terms, related meaning, and typos all find the right note.
- **Discover (發掘)** — surfaces semantically related Cold notes against your Hot pool, so blind spots become visible.
- **AI curation (opt-in, off by default)** — single-note description generation + topic-grouped MOC via HDBSCAN clustering + LLM naming.
- **SQLite storage** — replaces v0.x's `data.json` / `index.json`.
- **WebGPU indexing** — 5,000+ chunks indexed in ~1.5 minutes on a modern laptop.

## Privacy

| Mode | Where embeddings run | Where note text goes |
|---|---|---|
| **Built-in** | On-device | Stays on your device |
| **Ollama (local)** | 127.0.0.1 | Stays on your device |
| **OpenAI-compatible** | Endpoint you choose | Depends on the endpoint |

No telemetry. No usage tracking.

## Upgrading from vault-search

⚠️ Do **not** use Community plugins → Uninstall on the old `vault-search` — a different plugin authored by another developer now occupies that id and may insert itself when you uninstall. Instead:

1. Open your vault folder, find `.obsidian/plugins/vault-search/`
2. Delete that folder directly from the filesystem
3. Install vault-curate (see below)
4. Enable — the Welcome modal will guide you through rebuilding the index

Frontmatter (description / tags) in your notes is preserved; embeddings are rebuilt from scratch (~1–2 min on WebGPU).

## Installation

- **Community store**: search "Vault Curate"
- **BRAT**: add `notoriouslab/vault-curate`
- **Manual**: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `worker.js`, `ort-wasm-simd-threaded.wasm`, `styles.css` from below into `.obsidian/plugins/vault-curate/`

[English README](https://github.com/notoriouslab/vault-curate/blob/main/README.md) · [繁體中文](https://github.com/notoriouslab/vault-curate/blob/main/README.zh-TW.md)

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
### What's new

- **Title keyword boost** — search now matches note titles, not just semantic content. Exact title match +0.25, partial +0.15, word overlap +0.08. Fixes #4.

### Bug fixes (since 0.3.0)

- OpenAI-compatible API support (`/v1/chat/completions`, `/v1/models`, `/v1/embeddings`)
- Resumable description generation — reads existing report, skips completed items, incremental save every 30 notes
- UI thread yielding in indexer and description generator loops (`setTimeout(0)`)
- MOC frontmatter: use actual description instead of empty string, dynamic timezone in pubDate
- HTTP + API key plaintext warning for non-localhost servers
- Guard incremental report save to prevent loop interruption
- Model dropdown refreshes when switching API format
- Model size label hidden when unavailable (OpenAI format)

releases.author: notoriouslab
releases.description:
## What's New

### Discover Tab
- **Active Discovery** — Open a note, sidebar auto-shows related notes with Cold notes highlighted
- **Global Discover** — Find Cold notes most related to your Hot (active) notes
- **MOC Generation** — Export search or discover results as a Map of Content note
- **Cold Search Scope** — Dedicated "Cold only" search mode for intentional exploration
- **Tier Badges** — ❄️/🔥 visual markers distinguish Hot and Cold results at a glance
- **Canvas Integration** — Drag any result directly onto Canvas for visual mapping
- **Context Menu** — Right-click results for Obsidian's native file menu

### Performance & Stability
- **computeTier O(N²)→O(N)** — Pre-built incoming link index, scales to large vaults
- **Indexing mutex** — Prevents concurrent rebuild/update/auto-index operations
- **Embedding timeout** — 30s timeout prevents hangs when Ollama is loading models

### Security Hardening
- **URL validation** — Server URL restricted to http/https only
- **Description length cap** — LLM output capped at 500 chars to prevent injection abuse
- **splitChunks guard** — Prevents infinite loop on invalid overlap settings

### Other
- **Settings/Index separation** — `index.json` stored independently, with v0.2.0 migration
- **Full i18n** — All UI strings including sidebar name, ribbon tooltip, and MOC titles
- **Compass icon** — No longer conflicts with Obsidian's built-in search

## Install

**BRAT (recommended):** Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat), add `notoriouslab/vault-search`, enable in Community plugins.

**Manual:** Download the 3 files below, copy to `.obsidian/plugins/vault-search/`, enable in Settings.
